_comment: Model routing table — AI reads this directly to decide fallback order. Per Intelligence Over Scripts principle, the AI decides routing; bash only checks availability.
_docs: See .agents/tools/context/model-routing.md for routing rules, .agents/tools/ai-assistants/fallback-chains.md for integration.

local._comment: llama.cpp or compatible OpenAI-API server. No API key needed. Use local-model-helper.sh status to check.

ollama._comment: Ollama local model server. No API key needed. Probe /api/tags to check availability. OpenAI-compatible endpoint at /v1/.

openai._comment: API key OR OpenCode OAuth subscription (includes Codex). Auth checked via OPENAI_API_KEY env var or opencode auth.json.

ollama._comment: Ollama local model server. No API key needed. OpenAI-compatible API at /v1/. Use local-model-helper.sh status to check.
